_publications._publicationTitle: Multidimensional Immunotyping of Human NF1-Associated Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors Uncovers Tumor-Associated Macrophages as Key Drivers of Immune Evasion in the Tumor Microenvironment.

_contextSnippet: Using QuanTIseq, we found that there was an overall expansion of myeloid cell populations in MPNST compared to PN. QuanTIseq is a validated computational pipeline for the analysis of bulk RNA sequencing that quantifies the density of ten defined immune cell types
details: Successfully quantified immune cell densities from bulk RNA sequencing; identified overall expansion of myeloid cell populations and enrichment of M2 macrophages (p=0.01) in MPNST compared to PN
